plugins.name: hello-world
plugins.description: Minimal starter plugin demonstrating a slash command and a skill

plugins.name: kcc-core
plugins.description: Core plugin: top-level context injections and shared commands / skills.

plugins.name: kcc-dev-core
plugins.description: Development-focused plugin: conditionally injects code-discipline principles when the session is inside a software project, and hosts shared dev skills / hooks.

plugins.name: kcc-preview
plugins.description: Mirror preview-worthy content from a Claude Code session to a local browser UI with a session-scoped index.

plugins.name: kcc-testing
plugins.description: LLM-executable manual QA test case authoring — write-test-cases skill turns a PRD into a YAML coverage set.

plugins.name: kcc-dev-workflow
plugins.description: Orchestrates brainstorm (incl. user-driven UX visual direction loop producing an approved ui-kickoff.html) → spec → UI/UX → AC → multi-agent review+rewrite (4 personas incl. UX lens auditing HTML faithfulness) → test cases → multi-agent review+rewrite, with resume support. Phase 0 runs step-brainstorm in the main session; a 6-teammate team chains the production steps. Leverages superpowers:brainstorming and kcc-testing when present, self-contained otherwise.

plugins.name: kcc-backlog
plugins.description: Record work items the user wants to defer and recover them later. Silent-by-default.
